metadata.description: Jonathan Dick's collection of portable, cross-agent skills for Claude Code, Copilot CLI, and friends.

plugins.name: skill-reflect
plugins.description: Session-based reflection on distributed skill performance, with explicit local-skill review support. Defaults to scrubbed findings in chat, writes a local report only when requested, and requires destination-specific authorization before filing any GitHub issue. Ships opt-in hooks that stage tiny local candidate markers (no AI, no network) and a maintainer skill for vendoring and drift checks.
